news.headline: GROW with SAP on AWS launched to simplify ERP deployment. Customers can now deploy SAP's ERP solution on AWS for reliability and scalability.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, during AWS re:Invent, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS) and SAP SE introduced GROW with SAP on AWS. This collaboration aims to facilitate the quick deployment of SAP's ERP solution for customers of all sizes. By utilizing the reliability, security, and scalability of the highly embraced cloud service, this initiative will streamline the adoption of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) and SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) joined forces to offer this service, which is set to provide a seamless experience for businesses transitioning to SAP solutions.

news.headline: S&P 500 sector outlook: RBC raises US communication services to overweight from market weight.
SimScale and Hexagon team up to offer nonlinear structural analysis via SaaS, aiming to revolutionize engineering deployments.
news.summary: In Munich, SimScale GmbH and Hexagon’s Manufacturing Intelligence division have revealed a new partnership to revolutionize the deployment of advanced structural analysis for engineering teams. This collaboration aims to overcome accessibility challenges through providing Hexagon’s Marc nonlinear finite element solver as Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) on SimScale’s user-friendly cloud native platform. The strategic partnership seeks to unblock barriers and facilitate the utilization of cutting-edge capabilities, thereby reshaping engineering processes.

news.headline: Thales launches Data Risk Intelligence, combining Imperva Data Security Fabric and Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform.
news.summary: Thales has introduced a new Data Risk Intelligence solution in partnership with Imperva, aiming to combat data risks across all locations. This innovative solution merges the risk and threat identification features of the Imperva Data Security Fabric with the data protection functions of the Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform. The collaboration follows Thales' acquisition of Imperva in December 2023, marking a significant step in enhancing data security measures.

news.headline: KYOCERA to showcase latest innovations at CES 2025 in Las Vegas, including AI and wireless tech. President Hideo Tanimoto.
news.summary: Kyocera Corporation, under President Hideo Tanimoto, revealed its participation in CES 2025, a significant tech trade show in Las Vegas, USA, happening from January 7 to 10, 2025. The company's theme, "Technology Advancing Mobility, for Engineers Driving the World Forward," will showcase high-definition aerial displays, AI ranging cameras, and underwater optical wireless communications. This move highlights Kyocera's focus on innovative technologies at global events.

news.headline: Deliverect acquires Tabesto for smart kiosk tech to boost in-store sales. 60 new employees join.
news.summary: In London, Deliverect, a prominent food tech SaaS firm, revealed the acquisition of Tabesto, the innovative all-in-one platform for restaurant and fast-food ordering and payment kiosk. This strategic move allows Deliverect's clients to enhance their online order management and boost in-store services through Tabesto's advanced technology. The acquisition involves the addition of 60 new employees to Deliverect's workforce, including Guillaume Hour.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - AUD, GBP, CAD, EUR, USD, NZD, CHF, JPY - Weakest
Sampo donates a significant amount to the Red Cross for Christmas.
Pacific Green buys land in Wagga Wagga, NSW to set up new energy park, expanding presence in Australia.
news.summary: In Sydney on December 3, 2024, Pacific Green, an international battery energy storage firm, announced the acquisition of land in Wagga Wagga, New South Wales. This location will be utilized for setting up their upcoming Australian energy park.

news.headline: Adara Ventures invests in SatVu, a thermal imaging startup, as part of £20M funding round for high-resolution satellite monitoring.
news.summary: Madrid-based Adara Ventures has disclosed its financial backing of SatVu, a pioneering company in advanced thermal imaging technology. This move signifies the inaugural investment from Adara Ventures Energy Fund. Co-leading the funding round with existing investors, the European venture capital firm contributed to the £20 million raised. SatVu utilizes its exclusive infrared technology to acquire the most precise thermal data globally, enabling monitoring capabilities from satellites in low orbit. This investment is expected to accelerate SatVu's growth and innovation.

news.headline: LINK token rises by 29%, named the genuine ‘bank coin’ by community. “XRP is a banker-themed memecoin,” noted Zach Rynes.
news.summary: Famous as "ChainkLinkGod," Zach Rynes stated that XRP, a cryptocurrency, is akin to a "memecoin" for bankers that did not gain enough popularity.

news.headline: Tivoli sees surge in revenue following record-breaking Halloween, predicts profit before tax of DKK 150 million for 2024. Joyful Christmas season anticipated.
news.summary: Tivoli's 2024 Christmas season kicked off on November 15th and has seen a strong turnout from visitors both local and international. The Christmas market at Tivoli has been recognized as one of the world's most exquisite. The park is anticipating a remarkable end to 2024, which holds special significance for Tivoli. The Halloween season concluded with record-breaking earnings, leading Tivoli to raise its financial outlook for the year. Initially expecting a revenue of DKK 1,250 million and pre-tax profit of DKK 130 million, Tivoli has upped its projections to revenue around DKK 1,300 million and pre-tax profit of around DKK 150 million for 2024. With robust visitor numbers and spending, Tivoli expects a historically high profit. CEO Susanne Mørch Koch anticipates a festive Christmas season until January 5th.

news.headline: Spar Nord Bank initiated a share buyback programme of up to DKK 500 million on 12 February 2024.
news.summary: Spar Nord's announcement number 10 for the year 2024 revealed a share repurchase plan amounting to a maximum of DKK 500 million. The buyback program commenced on February 12, 2024.

news.headline: Primary insiders traded in IDEX Biometrics ASA following EGM approval on 9 Oct 2024, with subscriptions on 28 Nov and 2 Dec.
news.summary: An upcoming offering in IDEX Biometrics ASA was approved during the Extraordinary General Meeting on October 9, 2024. Notifications were sent out regarding primary insiders' subscriptions on November 28 and December 2 of the same year.

news.headline: Approximately 88% of TO8 warrants exercised, Terranet to receive around SEK 17.2 million.
news.summary: Today, Terranet AB (publ) reported that 122,708,719 warrants of series TO8, around 88% of the total, were exercised for the subscription of an equal number of Class B shares at SEK 0.14 per share. This exercise is set to generate approximately SEK 17.2 million for Terranet before accounting for issue expenses.

news.headline: Virbac acquired Turkish company Mopsan for petfood & animal health product distribution on Dec 2.
news.summary: We completed the acquisition of Mopsan, a Turkish company, on December 2. Mopsan is known for distributing pet food and companion animal health products.

news.headline: Don't miss Haslinda Amin's insight on Bloomberg 12/03/2024! Tune in for some valuable information.
Nasdaq survey finds 35% firms turning to AI for compliance; hiring more data scientists. Regulatory tech key to adaptation.
news.summary: Nasdaq released its ninth Annual Global Compliance Survey, which included insights from 94 compliance professionals in the financial services industry. The survey revealed that 35% of respondents identified advanced technologies and AI as the main influences on their near-term compliance efforts. Firms are adapting to changing environments by hiring more data scientists and specialists. Technologies like AI and cloud are seen as tools that can enhance strategic insights and improve efficiency in handling regulatory compliance challenges. 35% of respondents expect AI to be the biggest driver of compliance process change in the next year. The financial industry is facing increasing regulatory requirements, financial crime, and operational challenges, prompting a focus on AI, cloud, and data quality.

news.headline: Swiss CPI YoY Actual 0.7% (Forecast 0.7%, Previous 0.6%)
Swiss Core CPI YoY Actual 0.9% (Forecast 0.9%, Previous 0.8%)
Swiss CPI MoM Actual -0.1% (Forecast -0.1%, Previous -0.1%)
Honeywell cuts 2024 outlook, Core & Main expected to report earnings at 65 cents per share on $1.99 billion revenue.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures showed a slight increase, drawing attention to certain stocks for investors. Before the opening bell, Core & Main, Inc. (NYSE:CNM) is expected to reveal quarterly earnings of 65 cents per share with revenue hitting $1.99 billion. In after-hours trading, Core & Main shares climbed by 0.04% to $48.31. Additionally, Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) recently entered a strategic agreement with Bombardier but adjusted its 2024 outlook, reducing the previously expected full-year revenue range of $38.6 billion-$38.8 billion. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Core & Main (NYSE: CNM) to release Q3 earnings on Dec 3, expected at 66 cents/share, revenue projected at $1.99 billion.
news.summary: Core & Main, Inc. (NYSE: CNM) is set to disclose its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, Dec. 3. Analysts anticipate earnings to reach 66 cents per share, up from last year's 52 cents per share. The Missouri-based company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.99 billion, compared to $1.83 billion a year ago. Additionally, Core & Main recently completed the acquisition of assets from ARGCO Northeast LLC. Following this news, Core & Main's shares closed at $48.29 on Monday, marking a 0.5% decrease. For further details, including analyst ratings, refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: S&P, Nasdaq hit record highs, Fear Index in 'Greed' zone. Tesla up 3.5%, SMCI surges 29%. Dow gained 7.5% in Nov.
news.summary: The market sentiment declined slightly as per the latest CNN Money Fear and Greed index report, although it remained in the “Greed” territory on Monday. U.S. stocks closed higher on the same day, witnessing notable upsurges with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite reaching new highs. Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) observed a 3.5% increase after being upgraded from Neutral to Buy by Roth MKM, which also raised the price target to $380. Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) shares surged by approximately 29% following the completion of an independent special committee review that contradicted EY’s findings. The Dow marked a 1.4% increase last week, posting a monthly gain of 7.5% for November. The S&P 500 also saw a 1.1% rise during the week. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tune in to Insight with Haslinda Amin on Bloomberg on December 3, 2024.
CleanSpark Inc. CEO bets on Bitcoin mining, not buying, as value lies in $BTC production facilities over balance sheet.
news.summary: CleanSpark Inc. disclosed that a significant portion of its shareholder value comes from its investments in mining facilities, rather than holding Bitcoin on its balance sheet. The CEO, Zach Bradford, mentioned during the fourth-quarter earnings call that while the company is open to direct Bitcoin purchases, it believes higher returns for shareholders stem from acquiring or constructing Bitcoin production facilities. By producing Bitcoins at profitable margins, the firm has been able to reduce the average cost basis of its Bitcoin stash. This approach allows for a consistent production of Bitcoin assets rather than a one-time purchase.

news.headline: Essity hosts Capital Markets Day in Valls, Spain to present strategy for profitable growth and financial targets. #EssityCMD #VallsSpain
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Essity is holding its Capital Markets Day at the production facility for hygiene products in Valls, Spain. The event aims to reveal the strategy for increasing profitable growth and outlining the roadmap to reach the company's financial targets. The focus will be on enhancing performance and expanding market share. This event is significant for investors and analysts interested in Essity's future outlook and financial performance.

news.headline: UK to evaluate design of the new labor survey in the Spring.
UK ONS: New figures show overall employment level is now 313,000 above pre-covid pandemic levels, rather than at similar levels as current data suggests.
Xi Jinping emphasizes advancing high-quality Belt and Road cooperation, focuses on quality in BRI initiatives.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping emphasized the necessity of advancing high-quality cooperation within the Belt and Road Initiative (BRI). Xi, who serves as the general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee and the chairman of the Central, highlighted the importance of this initiative for fostering strong partnerships. The BRI aims to enhance collaborative efforts, with significant emphasis on quality measures in various sectors.

news.headline: Phase 2 trial of imlifidase before GNT-0003 in Crigler-Najjar syndrome, targeting patients with anti-AAV antibodies. Lund, Sweden and Evry, France, Dec 3, 2024. Hansa Biopharma and Genethon collaboration.
news.summary: A clinical trial is set to take place involving individuals with existing anti-AAV antibodies that hinder the utilization of gene therapy. The trial will be held in LUND, Sweden and EVRY, France, commencing on December 3, 2024. It involves Hansa Biopharma, also known as "Hansa" (HNSA on Nasdaq Stockholm), collaborating with Genethon, a prominent entity specializing in gene therapy. This partnership signifies a significant step in addressing the challenges posed by such antibodies in the context of gene therapy.

news.headline: HKBU scientist's Automated Multiplex Diagnostics System endorsed by WHO for low-resource settings. - Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 3, 2024, Professor Terence Lau, the Interim Chief Innovation Officer at Hong Kong Baptist University (HKBU), has introduced the Automated Multiplex Diagnostics System. This technology has been endorsed in the 2024 Compendium of Innovative Health Technologies for Low-resource Settings.

news.headline: Configit releases Configit Ace® 7 and Quote® 13, allowing customers to go from product sheet to configurator in just 10 minutes.
news.summary: Configit, a global leader in Configuration Lifecycle Management (CLM), has unveiled Configit Ace® 7 and Quote® 13, introducing Gen-AI enhanced technology that accelerates the process for customers to move from product sheets to product configurators. This innovative system allows users to complete the transition within just 10 minutes. The announcement was made in Copenhagen, Denmark on December 3, 2024. Configit aims to streamline the customer experience by leveraging AI capabilities to enhance CLM, providing efficient solutions for businesses.

news.headline: UK ONS: The economic inactivity rate is down 0.1% to 22.1%.
UK ONS: The employment rate is revised up 0.1% to 74.6% in April to June 2024.
UK ONS: The unemployment rate is largely unchanged at 4.2%.
IEI introduces HTB-230D-R680E Medical AI Computer to enhance medical imaging; revolutionizing diagnostics. #IEIIntegrationCorp #PRNewswire #TAIEX3022
news.summary: In Taipei on December 3, 2024, IEI Integration Corp. (TAIEX:3022) revealed the introduction of the HTB-230D-R680E Medical AI Computer. This advanced technology aims to transform medical imaging diagnostics. With a rising need for accurate and swift medical imaging solutions, this innovation is set to make a significant impact in the field.

news.headline: Marriott's Luxury Group to set new standard in luxury hospitality with new destinations and experiences by 2025. #MarriottLuxury
news.summary: Marriott International, Inc. has announced from the International Luxury Travel Market (ILTM) in Cannes, its Luxury Group's introduction of new upscale destinations, safari camps, and immersive travel experiences that redefine luxury hospitality standards. The unveiling took place in BETHESDA, Md., on Dec. 3, 2024. The offerings aim to elevate the high-end travel industry with innovative and exceptional services, reinforcing their commitment to providing extraordinary luxury experiences to customers.

news.headline: ATRenew Inc. (NYSE: RERE) recognized by UNGC's Forward Faster Campaign for Sustainable Development in China.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Shanghai, ATRenew Inc. (NYSE: RERE), a prominent technology-based platform for pre-owned consumer electronics in China, revealed its acknowledgment by the United Nations Global Compact. This recognition underscores ATRenew's position as a key player in the industry, emphasizing its commitment to sustainable and ethical business practices.

news.headline: Recall, from Hacker News to $1.5M funding led by Jason Calacanis, transforming content organization.
news.summary: After receiving a $1.5 million investment from prominent venture capitalist Jason Calacanis following a post on Hacker News, Recall is set on revolutionizing how people and businesses manage their knowledge. The funding round was finalized on December 3, 2024 in Amsterdam. Recall, known for its platform at getrecall.ai, aims to streamline the way individuals and companies access, arrange, and evaluate information.

news.headline: EPAM acquires First Derivative to boost financial services with AI solutions worldwide. Strengthening operations in North America, Europe, and APAC.
news.summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. has recently completed a strategic acquisition to bolster its financial services delivery capabilities significantly across North America, Europe, and the APAC region. The acquisition will enhance EPAM's end-to-end services. The transaction, finalized on December 3, 2024, marks a significant milestone for the company. EPAM Systems, Inc., listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EPAM, stands as a prominent player in providing digital transformation services. This move underscores the company's commitment to expanding its market presence and strengthening its offerings in key regions globally.

news.headline: Equinor ASA has initiated its fourth tranche of the 2024 share buy-back program across multiple stock exchanges.
news.summary: Below are details regarding transactions conducted as part of the fourth tranche of Equinor ASA's 2024 share buy-back program. Equinor ASA is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the tickers OSE:EQNR, on the New York Stock Exchange under NYSE:EQNR, on the CEUX under CEUX:EQNRO, and on the TQEX under TQEX:EQNRO.

news.headline: Martin Fischer will take over as CEO of Forvia on March 1, 2025, succeeding Patrick Koller.
Advancement of share repurchase plan with a total value of $500 million.
Avaloq and Quadient partner to enhance client communications for financial services with Quadient Inspire CCM solution.
news.summary: Quadient and Avaloq have joined forces to provide advanced customer communications management (CCM) solutions for the financial services sector. As part of their partnership, Avaloq, a prominent player in core banking and wealth management technology, has chosen Quadient Inspire as its CCM solution. This collaboration aims to enhance communication efficiency and customer engagement. The partnership between Quadient, listed on Euronext Paris as QDT, and Avaloq is set to revolutionize CCM in the financial industry by incorporating Quadient Inspire into the Avaloq platform. This move is expected to bring unparalleled capabilities to improve business relationships and sustainability in financial services.

news.headline: Vow ASA's subscription rights trading ends. Restrictions apply. No offer for securities. Refer to important notice.
news.summary: The information contained in this announcement is not intended for distribution or release in the United States, Canada, Australia, the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China, Japan, or any other jurisdiction where such actions would be unlawful. Additional restrictions may apply. This announcement does not represent an offer of any securities mentioned. Please refer to the important notice provided at the conclusion of this announcement.

news.headline: AS Tallink Grupp's November 2024 stats: 369,996 passengers (-1.9%), 21,409 cargo units (-19.4%), 47,101 vehicles (-6.3%).
news.summary: During November 2024, AS Tallink Grupp saw a decline in the number of passengers transported, totaling 369,996 individuals, marking a 1.9% decrease from November 2023. The company also experienced a significant decrease in cargo units, with a drop of 19.4% compared to the previous year, totaling 21,409 units. Additionally, there was a 6.3% decrease in the number of passenger vehicles, with 47,101 vehicles recorded during the same comparison period.

news.headline: IPC has been approved to renew normal course issuer bid by TSX in Dec 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, International Petroleum Corporation, also known as IPC and trading under the tickers TSX and Nasdaq Stockholm: IPCO, received approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) to renew its normal course issuer bid (NCIB). This signifies the Corporation's intention to repurchase a certain number of its shares from the market.

news.headline: Epsilogen starts Phase Ib trial of MOv18 IgE to treat platinum-resistant ovarian cancer, enrolling 45 patients.
news.summary: British company Epsilogen has initiated a Phase Ib study on MOv18 IgE for platinum-resistant ovarian cancer (PROC). This open-label trial (NCT06547840) will involve 45 PROC patients who have advanced after a maximum of four prior treatments. The study aims to evaluate the safety, tolerability, and effectiveness of the treatment. Epsilogen specializes in developing IgE antibodies for cancer therapy and is a key player in this field.

news.headline: Turkish CPI MoM Actual 2.24% (Forecast 1.92%, Previous 2.88%)
